---
title: Marcus S. Aichmayr
format: html
image: images/profile.png
about:
  template: solana
toc: false
---

I just defended my PhD in mathematics at the University of Kassel, Germany.

My research focuses on circuit computation, oriented matroid theory, and applications to linear inequality systems and chemical reaction networks.
I'm also developing packages for SageMath.

<!-- I am a postdoctoral researcher in mathematics at the University of Kassel, Germany. -->

### Research interests

* Circuit computation
* (Oriented) matroid theory
* Linear inequality systems
* Chemical reaction networks

<!-- > "If I had more time, I would have written a shorter letter." -- Blaise Pascal -->

> "Coming up with complex things is easy. Coming up with simple things is hard." -- Daniel Piechnick
